lineage.Process: UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\博士课题一\a博士课题一：城市热岛与空调互动\大湾区城市建筑群数据GIS pro\macao_building\building\multipatch_arcgispro</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>bld_patch</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>UM</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\博士课题一\a博士课题一：城市热岛与空调互动\大湾区城市建筑群数据GIS pro\macao_building\building\multipatch_arcgispro</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>bld_patch</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>lab</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Field</field_name><field_type>LONG</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\博士课题一\a博士课题一：城市热岛与空调互动\大湾区城市建筑群数据GIS pro\macao_building\building\multipatch_arcgispro</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>bld_patch.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>lab</field_name></DeleteField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>lab</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.0.0'><WorkspaceConnectionString>DATABASE=D:\博士课题一\b博士工作一：城市热岛与空调互动\大湾区城市建筑群数据GIS pro\macao_building\building\multipatch_arcgispro</WorkspaceConnectionString><WorkspaceFactory>Shapefile</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>bld_patch.shp</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>x</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>y</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>z</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>False</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateGeometryAttributes "bld_patch selection" "x INSIDE_X;y INSIDE_Y;z INSIDE_Z" # # # "Same as input"
DeleteField "bld_patch selection" UM 删除字段
DeleteField "bld_patch selection" lab;x;Field;y;z 删除字段
